member.name: T:R2API.BuffsAPI
member.summary: API for adding various stuff to Character Body such as: Modded Body Flags

member.name: F:R2API.BuffsAPI.NoneStackingDisplayMethod
member.summary: Ready-to-use custom StackingDisplayMethod to hide stacking buff display text while also retaining its stacking functionality

member.name: M:R2API.BuffsAPI.RegisterStackingDisplayMethod(R2API.BuffsAPI.CustomStackingDisplayMethod)
member.summary: Create and reserve StackingDisplayMethod for custom buff display text. Modify inside of your CustomStackingDisplayMethod method

member.name: M:R2API.BuffsAPI.SetSimpleSpriteAnimation(RoR2.BuffDef,RoR2.SimpleSpriteAnimation)
member.summary: Set animated sprite for your BuffDef

member.name: M:R2API.BuffsAPI.SetCustomSimpleSpriteAnimation(RoR2.BuffDef,R2API.BuffsAPI.CustomSimpleSpriteAnimation)
member.summary: Set custom animated sprite for your BuffDef

member.name: M:R2API.BuffsAPI.GetCustomSimpleSpriteAnimation(RoR2.BuffDef)
member.summary: Get custom animated sprite of your BuffDef

member.name: M:R2API.BuffsAPI.ReserveBuffFlag
member.summary: Reserve ModdedBodyFlag to use it with , and

member.name: M:R2API.BuffsAPI.AddModdedBuffFlag(RoR2.BuffDef,R2API.BuffsAPI.ModdedBuffFlag)
member.summary: Adding ModdedBuffFlag to BuffDef. You can add more than one body flag to one BuffDef

member.name: M:R2API.BuffsAPI.HasAnyModdedBodyFlag(RoR2.BuffDef)
member.summary: Checks if BuffDef instance has any ModdedBuffFlag assigned. One BuffDef can have more than one buff flag.

member.name: M:R2API.BuffsAPI.HasModdedBuffFlag(RoR2.BuffDef,R2API.BuffsAPI.ModdedBuffFlag)
member.summary: Checks if BuffDef instance has ModdedBuffFlag assigned. One BuffDef can have more than one buff flag.

member.name: F:R2API.BuffsAPI.PluginVersion
member.summary: Version of the plugin, should be matching with the thunderstore package.

member.name: T:R2API.AutoVersionGen.AutoVersionAttribute
member.summary: Add a PluginVersion field to the attribut-ed class filled from the thunderstore.toml versionNumber field
